summary: Iteration 19 - Payment Gateway Fixes testing complete. Backend: 7/7 API tests passed (create-order accepts currency INR/USD, defaults to INR). Frontend code review verified: PaymentPage correctly handles isInternational and currency props - International shows only Razorpay tab with $ amount and USD badge, Domestic defaults to UPI QR first with tabs for Razorpay and Bank Transfer. EventRegistrationPage correctly passes currency and isInternational props based on registration category. MembershipApplyPage uses defaults (INR, domestic).
critical_code_review_comments: PaymentPage.jsx (Line 7): Props currency='INR' and isInternational=false are correct defaults
PaymentPage.jsx (Lines 25-33): useEffect correctly sets default tab - International forces 'razorpay', Domestic tries UPI first
PaymentPage.jsx (Lines 117-126): Tab building - International: only Razorpay; Domestic: UPI > Razorpay > Bank (correct order)
PaymentPage.jsx (Lines 145-147): Amount displays currSym which is $ for USD, ₹ for INR
PaymentPage.jsx (Lines 148-152): Blue badge 'Payment in {currency} via Razorpay' shown only when isInternational=true
PaymentPage.jsx (Lines 156-168): Tab bar hidden when tabs.length <= 1 (e.g., international with only Razorpay)
PaymentPage.jsx (Lines 52-54): create-order API call passes currency prop to backend
MembershipApplyPage.jsx (Lines 140-150): PaymentPage called without currency/isInternational - uses defaults (INR, domestic)
Backend server.py (Line 2036): payment.currency = data.currency correctly stores currency
Backend server.py (Lines 2042-2047): Razorpay order.create() passes currency: data.currency
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment gateway fixes verified. International delegates (registration_category='international') see only Razorpay with $ amounts and 'Payment in USD via Razorpay' badge. Domestic categories (Member, Non-Member, Student) default to UPI QR tab as primary payment method, with Razorpay and Bank Transfer as secondary options. Tab bar is hidden when only 1 option available. Backend create-order API correctly accepts and passes currency field to Razorpay.

event_registration_category_selection.domestic_categories_prices: VERIFIED - Show ₹ amounts (₹3,500 for Member, ₹5,000 for Non-Member, ₹2,000 for Student)
